title: GoDaddy: Internet Infrastructure's Best Near-Term Capital Gain
text: A 3-5 month prospect from here of GDDY share prices could reasonably range from a $69.01 low to an $85.53 high from its present $70.53 price, a +21.3% gain. 38 positions like today's in the past 5 years' 1261 market days produced average net gains at 12.5% each during 41 market days (8 weeks), an annual +106% CAGR rate.

title: 3 Top E-Commerce Stocks to Buy in July
text: E-commerce is still a great business to invest in over the long term.
